logs.message: MyApp.Api depends on OpenTelemetry.Exporter.Prometheus.AspNetCore (>= 1.11.2-rc.1) but OpenTelemetry.Exporter.Prometheus.AspNetCore 1.11.2-rc.1 was not found. OpenTelemetry.Exporter.Prometheus.AspNetCore 1.12.0-beta.1 was resolved instead.
MyApp.Infrastructure depends on StackExchange.Redis (>= 2.8.25) but StackExchange.Redis 2.8.25 was not found. StackExchange.Redis 2.8.29 was resolved instead.
